activities:activities_review.description: Daily review for missed in-person meetings, calls, and brief interactions.
activities:activities_review.title: Activities Review

awareness_tender.description: Maintains identity/awareness.md — a compact situational awareness snapshot
awareness_tender.title: Awareness Tender

chat.description: Structured conversational reply planner for the chat backend rewrite
chat.title: Chat

coder.description: Developer agent with full repo read/write access
coder.title: Coder

conversation.description: Generates a conversation story, topics, and structured commitments, closures, and decisions to merge onto the activity record.
conversation.title: Conversation Story

daily_schedule.description: Analyzes activity patterns to identify optimal times for scheduled maintenance tasks.
daily_schedule.title: Maintenance Window

digest.description: Synthesize a plain-English digest of who sol is and what's happening now.
digest.title: Digest

documents.description: Extracts structured intelligence from imported documents
documents.title: Document Analysis

entities.description: Extracts people, companies, projects, and tools from segment content
entities.title: Entity Extraction

entities:entities.description: Mines journal for entity mentions and records facet-scoped detections with day-specific context
entities:entities.title: Entity Detector

entities:entities_review.description: Reviews detected entities and promotes recurring ones to attached status
entities:entities_review.title: Entity Reviewer

entities:entity_assist.description: Quick entity addition with intelligent type detection and automatic description generation
entities:entity_assist.title: Entity Assistant

entities:entity_describe.description: Research and generate single-sentence descriptions for attached entities
entities:entity_describe.title: Entity Description

entities:entity_observer.description: Extracts durable factoids about attached entities from journal content
entities:entity_observer.title: Entity Observer

event.description: Generates an event story, topics, and structured commitments, closures, and decisions to merge onto the activity record.
event.title: Event Story

exec.description: Sol — the journal itself, as a conversational partner
exec.title: Exec

facet_newsletter.description: Creates comprehensive daily newsletters for each facet, capturing activities, progress, and insights
facet_newsletter.title: Facet Newsletter Generator

heartbeat.description: Sol's periodic self-awareness — journal health, agency tending, curation scan
heartbeat.title: Heartbeat

import:review.description: Unified import review: resolves staged entities, then facets, then config in dependency order.
import:review.title: Import Review

import:review_config.description: Reviews and resolves staged config field differences from journal-to-journal import.
import:review_config.title: Import Config Reviewer

import:review_entities.description: Reviews and resolves staged entities from journal-to-journal import, handling low-confidence matches, ID collisions, and principal conflicts.
import:review_entities.title: Import Entity Reviewer

import:review_facets.description: Reviews and resolves staged facet items from journal-to-journal import, handling unmapped entities and facet.json conflicts.
import:review_facets.title: Import Facet Reviewer

joke_bot.description: Mines the analysis day's journal for poignant moments and crafts a personalized joke delivered via message
joke_bot.title: Joke Bot

morning_briefing.description: Synthesizes all daily agent outputs into a structured five-section morning briefing
morning_briefing.title: Morning Briefing

naming.description: Proposes a personalized name for the owner's journal assistant
naming.title: Naming

participation.description: Consolidates per-segment Sense entity drafts into a structured per-activity participation list.
participation.title: Participation

partner.description: Weekly observation of the journal owner's behavioral patterns — work style, communication, priorities, decision-making, expertise
partner.title: Partner Profile

pulse.description: Living narrative of the owner's day — updated each segment
pulse.title: Pulse

reflection.description: Sol — longer-form reflective synthesis grounded in the journal
reflection.title: Reflection

routine.description: User-defined routine execution — runs owner instructions on schedule
routine.title: Routine

schedule.description: Extracts future scheduled items from screen and transcript content into anticipated activity records. Captures dates, times, participants, and cancellation state.
schedule.title: Upcoming Schedule

screen.description: Creates a detailed documentary record of screen activity. Focuses on the 'what' - chronological account with preserved details, excerpts, and entities.
screen.title: Screen Record

sense.description: Unified segment understanding — density, content type, entities, facets, speakers, and routing recommendations in a single pass
sense.title: Segment Sense

skills:skill_editor.description: Writes or refreshes one skill profile per day from observer-flagged patterns or chat edit requests.
skills:skill_editor.title: Skill Editor

skills:skill_observer.description: Daily owner-wide scan for recurring skill patterns in today's activities.
skills:skill_observer.title: Skill Observer

speaker_attribution.description: Identifies who said what in each transcript segment. Layers 1-3 (owner, structural, acoustic) run computationally via hook; Layer 4 uses contextual LLM analysis for remaining unmatched sentences.
speaker_attribution.title: Speaker Attribution

steward.description: Synthesizes federated health signals into identity/health.md.
steward.title: Steward

support:support.description: Files and monitors support requests with sol pbc — consent-gated, never sends data without explicit owner approval
support:support.title: Support

todos:daily.description: Carries forward unfinished tasks, aggregates per-activity todo detections, validates completions against journal evidence, and prioritises the day's checklist.
todos:daily.title: Daily TODO Curator

todos:todo.description: Detects todo items from activity transcripts and validates existing todos against activity evidence via sol call commands.
todos:todo.title: TODO Detector

todos:weekly.description: Audits the past week's journal follow-ups to confirm completions and surface the next five high-impact todos for today.
todos:weekly.title: TODO Weekly Scout

weekly_reflection.description: Sunday-start weekly reflection synthesized from the journal
weekly_reflection.title: Weekly Reflection

work.description: Generates a work story, topics, and structured commitments, closures, and decisions to merge onto the activity record.
work.title: Work Story
